headline: Is Invesco (IVZ) Cheap On Rising Earnings Beat Hopes?
summary: Rising expectations around Invesco (IVZ) are building ahead of its upcoming earnings report, as recent analyst commentary points to the possibility of an earnings beat and renewed interest based on valuation metrics and easing market conditions. See our latest analysis for Invesco. The recent optimism around an earnings beat comes on top of strengthening momentum in Invesco's stock, with a 90 day share price return of 20.22% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 47.24% signaling renewed...
